sections.paragraph:
ἀποδείϰνυμι [ἀπό, δείϰνυμι; ‘point away from’ and so ‘focus attention’ on a specific object]

—1. ‘set up for public display’, put on exhibition 1 Cor 4:9.

—2. ‘make a pretentious display’, flaunt 2 Th 2:4.

—3. ‘bear witness to credentials’, endorse, attest Ac 2:22.

—4. ‘support with evidence’, prove Ac 25:7.
